problem id: 4723911c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHR(1)

examples:
  11000000 -> 00000000
  10100001 -> 01000000
  11001011 -> 00000101
  00101111 -> 00010110
  10011110 -> 00001101
  00000101 -> 00000010
  01110001 -> 00100000
  00111110 -> 00011100
  01000000 -> 00000000

query: 11011101
predicted answer: 00101010
